title: MOONLIGHT20015 Shower Bath Mat Non Slip Anti Mould & Mildew with Strong Suction Cups Grip and Drain Holes Soft Rubber Shower Mats - PVC Bathroom Mat Machine Washable (70x38cm, White)
features: SHOWER MAT SIZES: Our rubber bath mat is available in 3 sizes: 40 x 100 cm, 38 x 70 cm & 53 x 53 cm so it's long and narrow enough to fit all types of roll-top curved and round baths; it will give a contemporary, luxurious look to any bathroom.

HIGH QUALITY & DURABLE: Our bath matt is suitable for all types of bathtubs, bathrooms & shower areas. Made from durable high-grade PVC with rubber back that is antibacterial, mildew & mould proof. It can be used in the home, as well as in hotels and other hospitality venues.

STRONG GRIP & BETTER DRAINAGE: Our Shower mats consist of up to multiple strong suction cups that hold the mat firmly in place in the bath for your peace of mind and up to multiple drainage holes allow water, soap suds & shampoo to easily flow away preventing the mat from being waterlogged.

SLIP RESISTANT & ANTI MOULD: Our non-slip shower mat is designed to fit all showers. The unique suction cups create a non-slip seal for maximum safety from slipping. This shower mat will not shift or slide even when you are soaked and step on it. The ideal non slip and anti mould bathmat provides you a completely safe and non-slip standing which prevents you from slipping.
EASY TO CARE: You can clean this soft bath mat by shower head directly after using it. It's also machine washable. Suitable for children elders and pets.
description: Product Description Shower Mat Our non-slip shower mat is designed to fit all showers, whether you are a person who likes to soak in the tub or stand directly under the shower. It is a good investment on a nonslip and just the right size bathroom mat. See More
